commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh In that you build your shrine at the head of every street, and make your high place in every street; and have not been as a harlot, in that you scorned payment; Price, before she will yield, (Haydock) or who follow such practices for a livelihood. (Calmet) Hebrew, "in that thou scornest hire. "(Protestants) Septuagint, "gathering rewards. "The difference consisted in Jerusalem's sinning through mere wantonness, and even to her loss.
